title: Morphle Classics Rhymes
desc: Mila and her magical pet Morphle, who can morph into anything, shake a leg and sing to the tunes of traditional nursery rhymes.

title: Playtime with Twinkle Rhymes
desc: A comprehensive compilation of popular and traditional nursery rhymes that educate kids with the help of memorable characters are played.

title: Story Time
desc: A compilation of stories with important life lessons for children to promote their personal growth and development through the art of storytelling.
